task_prompt: Design a simple hello world function

turns.message:
Certainly! Below is an example of a simple "Hello, World!" function in Python:

```python
def hello_world():
    print("Hello, World!")

# Call the function to execute it
hello_world()
```

This function defines a procedure that prints "Hello, World!" when called. When you run this code, it will output:

```
Hello, World!
```
